programme.desc: A young couple in love run away together after their parents oppose their relationship. They are misguided into kidnapping a wealthy person for a big ransom by a shrewd uncle who has his own agenda.

programme.desc: A recovery agent and a designer become part of a big Bollywood event in New York, where chaos ensues, changing their lives forever.

programme.desc: The host invites prominent personas from the television industry to chat and share intriguing insights on their lives while engaging in a fun banter.

programme.title: Flight

programme.title: Laali Ki Shaadi Mein Laaddoo Deewana

programme.desc: S1 , E103 : Tejaswini's unforeseen endorsement brings immense delight to the family. Consequently, Sharvari expresses profound gratitude to Jay.

programme.title: Kamali
programme.desc: S1 , E357 : A courageous kabaddi champion hailing from the countryside of Maharashtra challenges her family's expectations by venturing to Mumbai in pursuit of her aspirations.

programme.title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
programme.desc: S1 , E320 : Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E451 : Atharva and Veda are heartbroken by Ambika's death. Ambika's love for Veda is so strong that her spirit returns. She protects Veda from beyond.

programme.title: Chaowa Pawa
programme.desc: Best friends Arun and Deb promise to get married on the same day, but the former gets into an accident. When he asks to see his fiancé for the last time, Deb sacrifices his love to fulfil the wish.

programme.title: Suorani Duorani
programme.desc: The king of Kishangarh marries a girl, unaware that she is a demoness. Upon learning the truth about his stepmother, the prince decides to save his father and their kingdom from her evil plans.

programme.title: Asha-O-Bhalobasa
programme.desc: Bijoy is jailed after being framed by Bilas Dutta, a famous businessman, and unable to deal with it, his sister commits suicide. When he is released from prison, Bijoy vows to seek revenge.

programme.title: Dan Protidan
programme.desc: Ashok becomes distraught following the demise of his wife. In a bid to usurp his wealth, Dilip, Ashok's cousin, takes advantage of the situation and begins to torture him.

programme.title: Swapno
programme.desc: A woman leaves a kind-hearted man owing to a misunderstanding and marries his younger brother. However, it turns out that he is the complete opposite of his elder brother.

programme.title: Matir Manush
programme.desc: After Meeting With An Accident, Payel Falls In Love With A Man. Things Turn When Her Father Disapproves Of Their Relationship.

programme.title: Projapati
programme.desc: A 65-year-old retired widower, living alone with his son Joy, hopes he will marry to ease his loneliness. However, Joy, a busy wedding planner, has no plans to settle down anytime soon.

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: Ramkishan and Mamta lead a happy life with their three sons. But when their daughter faces a tragedy, Mamta gets instigated by her close friends, and she embitters her heart towards her stepson Vivek.

programme.title: Selfiee
programme.desc: An RTO officer, Om Prakash, lands the opportunity to meet his idol, Vijay Kumar. However, a misunderstanding between the two men results in a clash of egos.

programme.title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
programme.desc: Milkha Singh, an Indian athlete, overcomes many agonising obstacles in order to become a world champion, Olympian and one of India's most iconic athletes.

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: Inspector Simmba is a corrupt officer who works for a major smuggler. He finds his values challenged as the gangster's brothers assault his sworn sister.

programme.title: Fashion
programme.desc: Fashion

programme.title: Lucknow Central
programme.desc: Kishen, an inmate in a Lucknow jail, yearns to be set free. When he learns that a few prisoners must form a band, he sees it as his ticket to freedom.

programme.title: Omerta
programme.desc: Ahmed Omar Saeed Sheikh, a British terrorist of Pakistani descent, plots the kidnapping and murder of Wall Street Journal journalist Daniel Pearl.

programme.title: Kai Po Che!
programme.desc: Three childhood friends who start a cricket academy for young aspirants in Gujarat, navigate through a natural disaster and communal and political tensions.

programme.title: Padmaavat
programme.desc: Driven by his mad obsession with Queen Padmavati, a tyrannical Khilji sultan tries every trick in his arsenal to take her captive. But when nothing works, he decides to unleash the fury of war upon her kingdom.

programme.title: Made in China
programme.desc: Raghuveer Mehta, a failing businessman, travels to China for some work. During the trip, he hatches a plan to sell an aphrodisiac that enhances men's sexual health in India.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: After being sacked from his position as a bank manager, a temperamental man plots revenge by orchestrating a robbery, enlisting three unlikely accomplices.
